34 #include <ros/duration.h>
35 #include <ros/impl/duration.h>
36 
37 namespace ros {
38 
39  Duration::Duration(const Rate& rate)
40  : DurationBase<Duration>(rate.expectedCycleTime().sec, rate.expectedCycleTime().nsec)
41  { }
42 
43  WallDuration::WallDuration(const Rate& rate)
44  : DurationBase<WallDuration>(rate.expectedCycleTime().sec, rate.expectedCycleTime().nsec)
45  { }
46 
47  void normalizeSecNSecSigned(int64_t& sec, int64_t& nsec)
48  {
49  int64_t nsec_part = nsec % 1000000000L;
50  int64_t sec_part = sec + nsec / 1000000000L;
51  if (nsec_part < 0)
52  {
53  nsec_part += 1000000000L;
54  --sec_part;
55  }
56 
57  if (sec_part < std::numeric_limits<int32_t>::min() || sec_part > std::numeric_limits<int32_t>::max())
58  throw std::runtime_error("Duration is out of dual 32-bit range");
59 
60  sec = sec_part;
61  nsec = nsec_part;
62  }
63 
64  void normalizeSecNSecSigned(int32_t& sec, int32_t& nsec)
65  {
66  int64_t sec64 = sec;
67  int64_t nsec64 = nsec;
68 
69  normalizeSecNSecSigned(sec64, nsec64);
70 
71  sec = (int32_t)sec64;
72  nsec = (int32_t)nsec64;
73  }
74 
75  template class DurationBase<Duration>;
76  template class DurationBase<WallDuration>;
77 }
ros
ros::Duration::Duration
Duration()

duration.h
ros::DurationBase< Duration >
ros::normalizeSecNSecSigned
ROSTIME_DECL void normalizeSecNSecSigned(int64_t &sec, int64_t &nsec)
